EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is unable to approve or deny a certificate signing request received from user {object.value} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} created certificate signing request "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to change object {object.storage.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is changing object {object.storage.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} approved a certificate signing request received from user {object.value} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is denying a certificate signing request received from user {object.value} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is approving a certificate signing request received from user {object.value} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to create a certificate signing request on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} viewed information about objects {object.storage.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete objects {object.storage.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is deleting objects {object.storage.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to view information about objects {object.storage.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is creating certificate signing request "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} denied a certificate signing request received from user {object.value} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is viewing information about objects {object.storage.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
